docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF VILMA ARANA APPEARED THROUGH SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE. DEFENDANT PERRY MAYORGA DID NOT APPEAR. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,600.00 FILED BY ARANA, VILMA AS TO DEFENDANT MAYORGA, PERRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-23-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. UNFILED PROOF OF SERVICE SUBMITTED TO THE COURT WAS DEFECTIVE. DEFENDANT SERVED BY SUBSTITUTE SERVICE WHICH WAS INCOMPLETE; NO INDICATION THAT THE CLAIM WAS MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF VIMA ARANA IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE SERVED MAY-26-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MAYORGA, PERRY
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARANA, VILMA AS TO DEFENDANT MAYORGA, PERRY
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARANA, VILMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAYORGA, PERRY $3,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,650.00, STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2400.00 ARE INLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S BAD FAITH FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
